summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Factory Management Tool. All 8 requested features tested and working correctly. Backend API tests (15/15 passed) and frontend UI tests all successful.

minor.issue: Returns max 1000 items due to to_list(1000) limit - may need pagination for 2402 RMs

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding pagination to /api/raw-materials endpoint for large datasets (currently limited to 1000 items)
seed_data_creation: Created test purchase entries for ACC_274 (50 units) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. 2402 RMs imported from Excel. Auth with JWT working. RM Inward Entry has search functionality and auto-activates RMs in branch. Dashboard shows branch-specific stats.

features_tested.login_with_admin_credentials: PASS - Login works with admin@factory.com/admin123, redirects to dashboard
features_tested.user_management_page_access: PASS - Accessible for master_admin role, shows user list with admin user
features_tested.rm_inward_entry_page_load: PASS - Page loads with search functionality and form
features_tested.rm_inward_search_acc_273: PASS - Search filters dropdown to show matching RMs (1 shown for ACC_273)
features_tested.rm_inward_submit_acc_274_qty_50: PASS - Entry submitted successfully, stock updated, toast shown
features_tested.dashboard_stats_update: PASS - Dashboard shows updated stats (Total Raw Materials: 2, Active RMs in Branch)
features_tested.raw_materials_page_list: PASS - Shows imported RMs with details (ACC_273, ACC_274, etc.)
features_tested.logout_functionality: PASS - Logout works and redirects to login page
